title: phyllanthus urinaria subsp. urinaria
intro: Phyllanthus urinaria subsp. urinaria, also known as Pueraria or the Chinese kidney bean, is a subspecies of the Phyllanthus urinaria plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiviral, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Phyllanthus urinaria subsp. urinaria include its ability to improve liver function, reduce blood pressure, and aid in the treatment of diabetes, as well as its potential to protect against liver damage and certain types of cancer. In herbal preparations, Phyllanthus urinaria subsp. urinaria is often used in teas, capsules, and extracts to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
